etymology.description: semantic 金(金) (jīn, "metal") + phonetic 慮(慮) (lǜ) -> metal associated with 慮 sound
etymology.interpretation: The character comprises 金(金) (jīn, "metal"), indicating the material's nature as a metal, combined with 慮(慮) (lǜ) for its phonetic contribution. This suggests a metal linked by sound to 慮, capturing the notion of a metal ingot.

examples.chinese: 鋁是非常輕的金屬(鋁是非常輕的金屬)。
examples.pinyin: Lǚ shì fēicháng qīng de jīnshǔ.
examples.english: Aluminum is a very light metal.

examples.chinese: 我在廚房裡使用鋁箔(我在廚房裡使用鋁箔)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zài chúfáng lǐ shǐyòng lǚ bó.
examples.english: I use aluminum foil in the kitchen.

examples.chinese: 這塊鋁板可用於製造汽車零件(這塊鋁板可用於製造汽車零件)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè kuài lǚ bǎn kě yòng yú zhìzào qìchē língjiàn.
examples.english: This aluminum sheet can be used to make car parts.
